_comment: Shadow fading margins from ITU-R P.1411 and 3GPP TR 38.901

_reliability_table._comment: Shadow fading margin increases with coverage probability target

_formula: SF_margin = sigma * Phi^{-1}(coverage_probability) where sigma = std dev of shadow fading (8-12 dB urban, 6-8 dB suburban, 4-6 dB rural)
